summary: Iteration 137: Foodics-style UI improvements for CashierPOS and Menu Items pages - All features verified working
critical_code_review_comments: UI styling changes only - no functional changes made
CashierPOSPage.jsx uses rounded-2xl for cards, shadow-sm/shadow-lg instead of borders
Category tabs now have pill shape (rounded-xl) with primary color for active state
MenuItemsPage.jsx card grid uses same Foodics-style (rounded-2xl, shadows, no borders)
DashboardLayout.jsx sidebar redesigned with light gray background (#f8f9fa), collapsible nav groups
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 137: Foodics-style UI improvements verified. CashierPOS page shows: clean white cards with rounded-2xl corners, pill-shaped category tabs (All Items, Popular, Main Dishes, etc.), shadow-sm/shadow-lg styling, Today Sales/Orders badges in header, cart panel with Cash/Bank/Credit payment buttons. Menu Items page shows: card grid with same Foodics styling, filter bar (search, category, branch, platform), Add Item dialog with tabs (Details, Sizes, Add-ons, Options, Branches, Platforms, Schedule). Dashboard sidebar has collapsible nav groups (Operations, Finance, People, Stock, Reports, Assets, Admin) with light gray background.

Category tabs visible and clickable (All Items, Popular, Main Dishes, etc.) - PASS
Category switching works - PASS (clicked Popular, back to All Items)
Add item to cart - PASS (clicked item, confirmed modifiers)
Payment buttons visible (Cash, Bank, Credit) - PASS
menu_items_page: Category filter works - PASS (67 items → 44 for Main Dishes)
Search filter works - PASS (67 items → 3 for 'chicken')
Menu item cards displayed in grid - PASS (67 cards)
Dialog tabs visible (Sizes, Add-ons, Branches) - PASS
dashboard_sidebar: SSC Track app title visible - PASS
Week button click enables comparison - PASS
Comparison cards show (This Week vs Last Week) - PASS
Nav groups clickable (Operations, Finance, People, Stock, Reports) - PASS
Menu Items link visible in Stock group - PASS

ui_changes_verified.cards_styling: White cards with rounded-2xl corners, shadow-sm/shadow-lg, no heavy borders
ui_changes_verified.category_tabs: Pill-shaped (rounded-xl) with primary color for active state
ui_changes_verified.sidebar: Light gray background (#f8f9fa), collapsible nav groups with smooth animation
ui_changes_verified.header_badges: Today Sales and Orders displayed in rounded badges
ui_changes_verified.payment_buttons: Cash (emerald), Bank (blue), Credit buttons with rounded-xl styling
